Notice Of Motion For Order To Apportion And Distribute Funds
Off Calendar Jan-23-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for hearing on the Motion to Apportion and Distribute Settlement Funds.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gerardo C. Sandoval. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

Kimberly Chu, Esq. appeared with Wrongful Death Heir Sandra Falk, who was placed under oath and testified.
Claimant Hillary Ludwig was present in pro per, placed under oath and testified.

The Court, having reviewed the moving papers and having considered the evidence, both oral and documentary, and good cause appearing, RULES that the following are entitled to distribution of all net funds from settlements from the underlying survival/wrongful death claims, in the following proportions:

Estate of Arthur Johnson, Sr. - 0%.
Estate of Jeanne Johnson - 0%.
Estate of Arthur C. Johnson - 50%.
(With Equal Shares to Debra Johnson-Hutchins, Hillary Ludwig and Scott Johnson)
Sandra Falk as Wrongful Death Heir - 50%.

Additionally, funds shall be issued by Brayton Purcell LLP in the percentages set forth above, subject first to fees and costs, (if any outstanding) and liens, including but not limited to liens (if any) payable to the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services' Medicare program and the California Department of Health Care Services Medi-Cal Program, and subject to any holds placed on funds awaiting response from such agencies.

Furthermore, all future net funds derived from settlements negotiated after the November 17, 2013 death of Plaintiff Arthur C. Johnson shall be distributed in the percentages set forth above.

Lastly, the signature of Sandra Falk shall be sufficient on all settlement documents for the purpose of settling wrongful death claims with defendants in the wrongful death action and in those claims made against bankruptcy-related trusts established for asbestos victims.

Counsel shall prepare the proposed Order to Apportion and Distribute Funds and submit same to the Court for review and signature.
